question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: shouldDownload()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit a network partition that causes the Spring `@Scheduled` executor to queue up hundreds of pending `download()` invocations while the current one is blocked on a network call, and upon partition recovery, all queued invocations fire simultaneously, causing a thundering herd against the cloud storage provider and DB?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: downloadNextBatch()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes `CompositeStreamFileProvider.shouldRetry()` to mark all providers as unhealthy via `provider.markUnhealthy()`, and since the backoff period is 60 seconds, create a window where no provider is available and all balance downloads silently fail for the entire backoff duration?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: downloadNextBatch()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit a network partition that causes `streamFileProvider.list()` to return signature files from only one node (below the consensus threshold), causing `verifySigsAndDownloadDataFiles()` to throw `SignatureVerificationException` on the last group, which is caught and only warned, while `lastStreamFile` is never advanced, creating an infinite retry loop on the same file?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: onVerified()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that interrupts the `Utility.archiveFile()` call when `downloaderProperties.isWriteFiles()` is true, causing a partial file write to disk, and since `onVerified()` still sets `accountBalanceFileExists` to true afterward, the corrupted archive is never retried or detected?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: downloadNextBatch()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit a network partition that causes `getStartAfterFilename()` to return `StreamFilename.EPOCH` because `lastStreamFile` is empty and `dateRangeCalculator.getLastStreamFile()` fails, causing the downloader to re-list all balance files from the beginning of time on every poll cycle, generating massive cloud storage API costs?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: shouldDownload()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that makes the DB connection pool exhausted (due to other partition-induced retry storms), causing `accountBalanceFileRepository.findLatest()` to block indefinitely waiting for a connection, which in turn blocks the `download()` scheduled thread and prevents any other scheduled tasks from running?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: downloadNextBatch()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit a network partition that causes `NodeSignatureVerifier.verifySignature()` to throw an unexpected `Exception` (e.g., `NoSuchAlgorithmException`) for all signatures, causing all signatures to remain in `DOWNLOADED` status, which then causes `ConsensusValidatorImpl.validate()` to find no `VERIFIED` signatures and throw, halting balance ingestion?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: downloadNextBatch()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes `S3StreamFileProvider.list()` to return signature files with sizes exceeding `downloaderProperties.getMaxSize()`, causing all files to be filtered out by the size check, resulting in an empty signature map and a silent stall of balance file ingestion?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: onVerified()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit a network partition that causes a split between the time `streamFileReader.read(streamFileData)` succeeds and `verify(streamFile, signature)` is called, allowing a hash mismatch to go undetected if the partition causes the hash verification to be skipped via the `HashMismatchException` catch path, and the file is still passed to `onVerified()`?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: downloadNextBatch()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes `Schedulers.parallel()` to have all threads blocked on network I/O, causing the `.subscribeOn(Schedulers.parallel()).block()` call in `downloadAndParseSigFiles()` to deadlock, permanently freezing the balance downloader?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: shouldDownload()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit a network partition that causes the `BalanceDownloaderProperties.isEnabled()` flag to be toggled to false by a concurrent thread (via the endDate check in `verifySignatures()`), while `shouldDownload()` reads it as true, creating a TOCTOU race where a download proceeds after the downloader was supposed to be disabled?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: downloadNextBatch()] Can an unprivileged external user cause a network partition that causes `streamFileProvider.list()` to return duplicate signature filenames for the same timestamp from different nodes, causing the `TreeMultimap` in `getStreamFileSignatureMultiMap()` to store them under the same key, and the arbitrary ordering comparator to non-deterministically select which signature is used for verification?
